displayName: Azure Static Web Apps should have public network access disabled
description: Audits Standard-tier Azure Static Web Apps that have public network access enabled. Standard tier supports private endpoints as an alternative access path; Free-tier apps are excluded since they cannot disable public access. Set the effect to Deny to block creation or update, or Audit to report non-compliant resources without blocking.

metadata.description: Audit logs a compliance warning without blocking; Deny blocks the request; Disabled turns the policy off.
